title: Eric Weinstein Reveals the Media Company of the Future
summary: A brief discussion about a new media company model where media content serves as the front end and investing serves as the back end. Eric Weinstein discusses the concept of aggregating influential voices and using the platform to identify and invest in high-agency individuals rather than relying on traditional advertising.

key_claims.claim: The media company of the future combines media as the front end with investing as the back end
There is a roll-up play opportunity to aggregate influential voices into a container that is distinct from conservative media like Fox News
Venture economics investments in high-agency young people are riskier but better than ads and the BuzzFeed model
